# Digital M

> Digital M (trading name of Digital Management Ltd) is an AI-for-commerce agency based in Ferrières-sur-Ariège, Ariège (Occitanie), France. We help local TPE/PME and e-commerce businesses adopt AI, automation and modern websites — grounded in 15+ years of real e-commerce and CRM delivery (100+ projects).

Digital M — agence IA, automatisation et création de site internet pour TPE/PME en Ariège (09), Haute-Garonne (31) et Occitanie. Près de Foix ; intervention à distance partout en France. Tarifs clairs dès 500 €, audit express gratuit sous 48 h.

## What we do
- AI agents & chatbots — assistants that answer FAQs, qualify leads and book appointments 24/7.
- Task automation — quotes, support, scheduling and reminders connected with n8n or Make.
- Website creation ("création de site internet") — fast, clear, locally-optimised sites built to convert.
- E-commerce — selling online with payment, stock and shipping wired together.
- Security audits — checking site, data and access for small businesses.
- Free 48-hour express audit — a concrete diagnostic of your automation opportunities, no commitment.

## Facts
- Legal entity: Digital Management Ltd (UK company no. 09457882), trading as "Digital M".
- Location: Ferrières-sur-Ariège (09000), Ariège, Occitanie, France — near Foix. Serves Ariège, Haute-Garonne and remotely across France.
- Contact: contact@digitalm.eu · +33 4 12 12 09 09 (04 12 12 09 09)
- Languages: French (primary), English.
- Pricing: clear fixed quotes from €500; free 48-hour express audit.
